# EdgeCollective - Golfer's Edge Community

> A community platform for golfers to track progress, compete on leaderboards, book bay sessions, attend events, shop gear, earn rewards, and join leagues.

## Pages

- [/](/): Home — landing page and overview of the community.
- [/book](/book): Book Bay — reserve golf bay practice slots.
- [/my-bookings](/my-bookings): My Bookings — view and manage your upcoming and past bookings.
- [/dashboard](/dashboard): Dashboard — track your practice progress and stats.
- [/leaderboard](/leaderboard): Leaderboard — compete with other members on performance rankings.
- [/events](/events): Events — browse and register for upcoming community events.
- [/community](/community): Community — social feed and member interactions.
- [/leagues](/leagues): Leagues — join and manage golf leagues and competitions.
- [/coaching](/coaching): Coaching — browse coaching sessions and manage your training.
- [/shop](/shop): Shop — purchase golf products and gear.
- [/rewards](/rewards): Rewards — view points balance, progress, and redeem rewards.
- [/profile](/profile): Profile — manage your account and preferences.
- [/grievance](/grievance): Grievance — submit and track support requests.
